title: phreatia finisterrae
intro: Phreatia finisterrae, also known as the Finisterre Phreatia, is a species of orchid native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, Phreatia finisterrae is often used to make teas or infusions, which are said to promote overall well-being and improve respiratory health.
